creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Please remove the port security/ca-roots from the tree.
The port is marked as depricated and the expiration time is set to 2007-07-07

I will send also send an update patch for the port security/ca_root_nss since this port can build with other methodes verry simple and is also out of date.

Regards,
  olli hauer
